creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress! 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you!

📅 January – Lost Spring Lake
📍 8045 NW Gainesville Rd, Ocala, FL 34475
💧 Start the year with crystal-clear waters, hidden cliffs, and serene beauty in this secret spring-fed lake.

📅 February – Whitney Beach
📍 N Shore Rd, Longboat Key, FL 34228
🌊 Escape the crowds with a peaceful beach day and sunset strolls at this tucked-away Gulf Coast gem.

📅 March – Bok Tower Gardens
📍 1151 Tower Blvd, Lake Wales, FL 33853
🌸 Spring blooms, quiet trails, and a singing tower – the perfect mix of peace and nature in Central Florida.

📅 April – The Dali Museum
📍 1 Dali Blvd, St. Petersburg, FL 33701
🎨 Explore surreal art and waterfront views while the weather is still cool.

📅 May – Bonnet Springs Park
📍 400 Bonnet Springs Blvd, Lakeland, FL 33815
🌳 Family fun, interactive art, and nature trails before the summer heat kicks in.

📅 June – Fort De Soto Park
📍 3500 Pinellas Bayway S, Tierra Verde, FL 33715
🏖️ Kayak, bike, or beach-hop around this historic park filled with wildlife and wide-open shorelines.

📅 July – Boca Grande
📍 Boca Grande, FL 33921 (Gasparilla Island)
🌅 Summer paradise! Clear water, pastel buildings, and island vibes for the perfect Florida July escape.

📅 August – Midnight Pass (Siesta Key)
📍 Southern end of Siesta Key, Sarasota, FL 34242
🛶 Kayak through hidden mangrove tunnels to a remote stretch of white sand – Florida’s best-kept secret.

📅 September – Bean Point
📍 793 N Shore Dr, Anna Maria, FL 34216
☁️ Unwind on this tranquil northern tip of Anna Maria Island – ideal for early fall sunsets.

📅 October – Henry B. Plant Museum
📍 401 W. Kennedy Blvd, Tampa, FL 33606
🏰 Step back into Gilded Age Florida at this ornate, historic hotel-turned-museum.

📅 November – Hindu Temple of Florida
📍 5509 Lynn Rd, Tampa, FL 33624
🛕 Discover peace and stunning architecture during fall festivals and Diwali celebrations.

📅 December – Bonnet Springs Park (again!)

#hiddengemsflorida
